各位面的历史人物就是弹幕里的八卦群体
不管是好人还是坏人都可以看到历史的内容，所以互相提前下手……"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1759291290,"group_id":"7212257900700371968","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"闯荡江湖的浆糊一枚","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+lPbm4MJUTveyQWKKrehaE=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/fb0be47ff3574799906793699042227a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776536827&x-signature=puZhr6%2BTLY5jXcaBnbq6%2FdCcQSY%3D","user_id":"110543563090","user_name":"宝贝乐园派"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"110543563090","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7212257900700371968","book_info":{"abstract":"盘点历史意难平。

每一个令世人意难平的人物都会上榜。

开局盘点十大意难平帝王。

秦始皇意难平：“孤要大秦千秋万代，世世相传，却不料二世而亡。”

朱棣意难平：“难道我一生的功绩，洗不清我靖难的罪名吗？”

崇祯意难平：“朕登基十七年，上干天怒，致逆贼直逼京师。朕死后以发覆面，任贼分裂朕尸，勿伤百姓一人！”

盘点十大忠臣意难平。

辛弃疾意难平：“了却君王天下事，赢得生前身后名，可怜白发生。”

岳飞意难平：“臣一生精忠报国，抵御金国，却不曾想在国复之后被陛下赐死。”

于谦意难平：“粉身碎骨浑不怕，要留清白在人间。”

这一刻，诸天万界的帝王们怒火中烧，忠臣良将，竟受如此大辱？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/6e208a083881bdff47105768c633d154","author":"范行一","author_id":"","book_id":"7212257900700371968","book_name":"惊现金榜盘点历史，震惊历朝诸皇","book_short_name":"金榜盘点历史","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8e8e8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7215982521220727331","read_count":"25839","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1653231"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.2","serial_count":"770","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,诸天万界,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7bc6ec491ca8bd408dadda52b4a4c69f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779181761&x-signature=n1757jSWq62voSt4XyrrpkDhVAM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1068314815111304","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"593"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201709211B2C5546154E895E856D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读38小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":136069,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":138053,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":660},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comme
